description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Mercury shoe comes in a sleek design, making this a great buy.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations on the midfoot Inner bootie to offer a better FitLacing system for a snug, customised fitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleEVA midsole for comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole textured with grooves on the forefoot and has herringbone grooves on the heel for absolute grip and tractionOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard for enhanced durabilityShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
